The 2026 Social Media Content Strategy That Actually Works

Author: Kay | Published: 2026-03-28

Most businesses post on social media with no strategy and wonder why nothing happens. The truth is that social media marketing in 2026 requires a content system, not random posts. The framework that works: 40% educational content, 30% social proof and case studies, 20% behind-the-scenes, and 10% direct offers.
